validation_results.name: Tests
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api test (227 files, 6137 passed/2 skipped) && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web test (586 files, 10343 passed)

validation_results.name: Build
validation_results.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web build (NODE_ENV=production with pre-ship stub Supabase env)

kpi_results.kpi: audit_findings_resolved (F-02 Tickets hardcoded, F-03 Documents hardcoded, F-21 hardcoded ticket timestamp)
kpi_results.actual: F-02,F-03,F-21 all resolved — Tickets & Documents tabs render real tenant-scoped contact.getById data; zero hardcoded literals remain (grep clean)

Tab logic (formatters, view-model transforms, Tickets/Documents tab rendering incl. empty states + both status-colour branches) extracted from the route page into components/contacts/{contact-tab-format.ts,ContactTicketsTab.tsx,ContactDocumentsTab.tsx} — 100% covered (stmts 29/29, branches 24/24, funcs 13/13, lines 23/23) by 20 new component/util tests. API: TicketService.ts 94.57% lines / 88.02% branch; changed-API aggregate 90.71% lines. ROOT CAUSE of the first SonarCloud miss (36.7%): Next.js route page.tsx files are excluded from the merged lcov, so logic kept inline in page.tsx counted as uncovered to Sonar (and was silently skipped by the local check-diff-coverage gate). Fix moves the coverable logic into tested modules whose coverage reaches the merged lcov.

definition_of_done_items.criterion: Tickets tab shows real data from API (or proper empty state)
definition_of_done_items.evidence: contact.getById returns tickets via TicketService.listByContact; page Tickets tab maps real tickets with EmptyState fallback (page.tsx Tickets tab). Tests: 'Tickets tab renders real tickets', 'Tickets tab shows an empty state'.

contact.getById returns documents (tenant+contact scoped, excludes DELETED); page Documents tab maps apiContact.documents with download links + EmptyState. Tests: 'Documents tab renders real documents', 'Documents tab shows an empty state'.

tabs memo uses tickets.length / documents.length (was count:0 and an inline length read). Tests: 'Tickets tab badge reflects the real ticket count', 'Documents tab badge reflects the real document count'.
grep for TKT-1234 / 2024-12-15T14:00:00Z / Enterprise License Proposal.pdf / SOC2 Compliance Report.pdf returns no data literals (only a code comment). Never-mock rule honoured.
Changed source files >=90% line coverage; full per-package suites green (api 6137, web 10343).

invariants_acknowledged: Tenant isolation: Ticket/Document have no ownerId column, so createTenantWhereClause is NOT used for them; both reads are scoped by { tenantId, contactId } and the contact is already access-checked upstream.
Never mock/simulate data — Tickets and Documents tabs render only real source data with honest empty states.
Optional infra degrades, never throws: a missing ctx.services.ticket yields tickets:[] rather than failing the Contact 360 view.
Query-only approach: no schema/relation/migration change (avoids adding an FK constraint to existing scalar contactId columns).

notes: IFC-256 — Contact Detail hardcoded Tickets & Documents tabs replaced with real tRPC/API data (resolves audit findings F-02, F-03, F-21). Backend: TicketService.listByContact (lean tenant+contact-scoped projection) + contact.getById now returns tickets (via TicketService) and documents (prismaWithTenant.document.findMany, { tenantId, contactId, status != DELETED }), both fetched in parallel and spread into both getById return paths; missing ticket service degrades to []. Frontend (apps/web/src/app/contacts/[id]/page.tsx): ContactWithRelations gains tickets + richer documents; new tickets/documents memos; Tickets/Documents tabs render real data with shared EmptyState empty states and working document download links; tab badges now read tickets.length / documents.length. No schema/migration change (query-only over existing scalar contactId columns). Validations: api+web typecheck clean; full api suite 6137 passed/2 skipped; full web suite 10343 passed; eslint 0 errors on changed files; api build + web prod build (stub Supabase env, pre-ship parity) green. Coverage of changed source >=90% lines. nav_wiring_confirmed: no new page.tsx created — this task changes existing-tab content on an already-reachable route (/contacts/[id], reachable via tab switcher + ?tab=tickets/documents). PRD docs/planning/prd-core-crm.md (Contacts/Tickets/Documents) referenced; ADR N/A (no new architecture). COVERAGE FIX (after PR #382 SonarCloud new_coverage = 36.7%): the tab logic was extracted out of the route page.tsx — which is excluded from the merged coverage report — into three unit-tested modules under apps/web/src/components/contacts/ (contact-tab-format.ts + ContactTicketsTab.tsx + ContactDocumentsTab.tsx), 100% covered by 20 new component/util tests. page.tsx is now a thin consumer (37 added lines, mostly imports + type-only interface fields). Follow-up filed for the check-diff-coverage blind spot (route page.tsx absent from merged lcov → silently skipped instead of counted uncovered).
